summary: Iteration 27 (Sidebar lockdown + Admin endpoints + Hub tabs) fully verified. Backend pytest (iter19-iter27 regression) 228 passed / 1 skipped, including all 8 iteration_27 tests. Frontend role-gating, hub tabs, deep-links, legacy routes, and admin CRUD UI all work as specified.
critical_code_review_comments: All requirements from review request met. Sidebar correctly locked at 6 items with proper role gating via minTier on nav-admin.
HubTabs deep-link via ?tab=<id> works correctly across ResidentsHub, StaffOperationsHub, ComplianceHub, HomeOperations - URL updates on click and reload preserves tab.
Role gating verified: staff hidden from nav-admin; staff redirected from /admin and /compliance; senior redirected from /admin; manager has nav-admin but no delete buttons; admin has delete buttons.
Admin endpoints: system-info correctly 403 for staff/senior, 200 for manager/admin; user create/delete RBAC correctly enforced; admin self-delete blocked; audit events recorded.
No mongodb _id leakage detected in Admin user list. Pydantic validation returns 422 for invalid email/short password. Duplicate email returns 400 as specified.
seed_data_creation: None - used existing seeded users and demo residents (Tom Whitfield adult_supported_living + Margaret Lewis elderly_residential keep CQC tab visible).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 27 is GREEN end-to-end. Pytest suite for iter19-iter27 = 228 passed, 1 skipped (iter22 skip is intentional). Frontend confirmed: 6-item sidebar (nav-dashboard, nav-residents, nav-operations, nav-staff-operations, nav-compliance, nav-admin); admin minTier=3 via Layout.jsx NAV array. StaffOperationsHub uses testid prefix 'staffops-tab-' (NOT 'staff-ops-tab-'). ComplianceHub uses 'compliance-tab-'. ResidentsHub uses 'residents-tab-'. HomeOperations uses 'ops-tab-'. Pre-existing iter15+iter17 stale-date fixture failures remain but are out-of-scope per user note.
